title: [v3.3.1-rhel] auto-update: fix authfile label
body:
Make sure that the container's authfile label is used when pulling down
a new image.

[NO TESTS NEEDED] since we need to add authfile tests to the main
branch.

Fixes: #11171
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

BZ:
* https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2002670
* https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2000943

@TomSweeneyRedHat please take a look

Backported commit e5468d404c77 as well to fix the CI error on search. @mheon, we'll probably need to do that on each stable branch :-/ (Cc @cevich)
I think the only LTS branches we really care about now are v3.3.1-rhel, v3.3, and v3.0.2-rhel, so v3.3 and v3.0.2 will need it.
